hero.name: Harshit Gupta
hero.title: Full Stack Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: Architecting scalable systems and delivering high-impact digital solutions for growth-focused companies.
hero.description: I build production-grade applications that scale

about.shortBio: Full-stack developer with expertise in modern web technologies. Passionate about building scalable applications and solving complex problems through elegant code.
about.longBio: I'm a software engineer dedicated to creating high-quality digital solutions. With expertise in full-stack development, I help businesses bring their ideas to life through innovative technology and clean code architecture.

responsibilities: Led development of microservices architecture handling 10M+ requests/day
Implemented real-time features using WebSockets and message queues
Mentored junior developers, improving team productivity by 40%
Optimized database queries reducing load times by 60%
Delivered 12+ diverse projects including e-commerce platforms, SaaS solutions
Built scalable applications using React.js, Node.js, and Next.js
Designed robust RESTful APIs with comprehensive testing
Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 55%
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to exceed client expectations
Built responsive and visually engaging frontends
Integrated third-party APIs and payment gateways
Provided technical consultation to small businesses

projects.title: E-commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform with real-time inventory management, payment integration, and admin dashboard

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: Collaborative task management application with real-time updates, team workspaces, and progress tracking

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time analytics dashboard displaying business metrics, user behavior, and performance insights

projects.title: Social Media API
projects.description: RESTful API for social networking platform with authentication, real-time notifications, and media handling

faqs.question: What's your tech stack?
faqs.answer: I primarily work with React, Next.js, and Node.js for full-stack development. I use Tailwind CSS for styling, PostgreSQL/MongoDB for databases, and deploy on Vercel or AWS. I'm always learning new technologies to stay current with industry standards.

faqs.question: Do you offer custom development?
faqs.answer: Yes! I provide custom development services for web applications, APIs, and automation tools. Whether it's a startup MVP or enterprise solution, I can help bring your vision to life with scalable, maintainable code.

faqs.question: What's your typical project timeline?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary based on complexity. A typical web app takes 4-12 weeks. I break projects into milestones to ensure transparent progress tracking and regular updates.

faqs.question: How do you approach problem-solving?
faqs.answer: I start by understanding requirements deeply, then design scalable solutions. I emphasize clean code, testing, and documentation. Regular communication ensures alignment throughout the development process.

faqs.question: Can you integrate third-party services?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. I have experience integrating payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal), analytics tools, email services, cloud storage, and more. I ensure seamless integration with proper error handling and security.
